{{Infobox location
| name = Green District
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Green District]] contains [[emerald]] titans and shield-backed turtles.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Enosh]]'s [[Green District]] is a location where white marble has grown in batches.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|There is plenty of food in the [[Green District]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
